title: EdU Staining Protocol in juvenile F. hepatica
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"hfdo","text":"This protocol describes the process of labelling and whole mount staining proliferative cells in in vitro juvenile Fasciola hepatica with the thymidine analogue 5-ethynyl-2′-deoxyuridine (EdU). The protocol is based on the Schistosoma mansoni EdU staining protocol developed by the Collins and Newmark groups. A full copy of that protocol is available here - http://collinslab.org/PDF/Whole_mount_EdU_Smansoni.pdf.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":97,"length":8},{"style":"italic","offset":115,"length":18},{"style":"italic","offset":223,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":359,"length":54}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"D2C87A412FE511EE924B0A58A9FEAC02","url":"http://collinslab.org/PDF/Whole_mount_EdU_Smansoni.pdf"}}}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"2c8f6","text":"Fixation","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4r7m5","text":"While flat fixing is necessary for worms grown for more than three weeks in vitro younger worms may be suitable for free fixing in 4%FA.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":73,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"bh9h0","text":"EdU Mutagen","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"47mgk","text":"As a thymidine analogue EdU is known for germ cell mutagenicity and reproductive toxicity. Particular care should be taken when disposing of the chemical and around pregnant mothers.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Juvenile liver fluke are cultured in 50% Chicken serum (CS50) as described in McCusker et al. (2016).
10 µL of 10 millimolar (mM) 5-Ethynyl-2'-deoxyuridine (EdU) is mixed with 190 µL pre-warmed CS50 and added to worms for between 6 and 24 h.
At conclusion remove EdU from worms
Wash worms x3 in 100 µL pre-warmed RPMI.
Wash in 1 mL PBSTx for 10 min.
Wash in 1 mL 1:1 PBSTx :Methanol for 10 min.
Store in 1 mL methanol at -20 °C until required.
Rehydrate in 1 mL 50:50 PBSTx :Methanol for 10 min.
x2 washes in 1 mL PBSTx for 10 min each.
Incubate in 1 mL fresh Proteinase K Solution for 15 min at Room temperature .
Postfix in 1 mL 4%FA for 10 min.
Wash in 1 mL PBSTx for 10 min.
Incubate in EdU Detection Solution for 30 min at Room temperature . NB: cover with tinfoil from this point on.
x2 washes in 1 mL PBSTx for 5 min each
Incubate in 1 mL DAPI Solution for 20 min at Room temperature or O/N at 4 °C .
Rinse in PBSTx and mount in VECTASHIELD Mounting Medium Vector Laboratories Catalog #H-1000 .
Add 20 µL 4% FA/4%PFA to a petri dish.
Pipette worms in into 4% FA/4%PFA and immediately flatten with coverslip and weight (e.g. half full 15 mL falcon tube) for 10 min.

Add 4% FA/4%PFA to float coverslip. Lift coverslip and move worms into 1.5 mL eppendorf with 1 mL 4% FA/4%PFA . Place tube on a rotator for further 10 min (4%FA)/2 h (4%PFA) at Room temperature OR O/N at 4 °C .
Add fresh CS50 to worms and return to culture until desired timepoint.
Add 20 µL 4% FA/4% PFA to a petri dish.
Pipette worms in into 4% FA/4% PFA and immediately flatten with coverslip and weight (e.g. half full 15 mL falcon tube) for 10 min.

Add 4% FA/4% PFA to float coverslip. Lift coverslip and move worms into 1.5 mL eppendorf with 1 mL 4% FA/4% PFA . Place tube on a rotator for further 10 min (4%FA)/2 h (4%PFA) at Room temperature OR O/N at 4 °C .
Wash in 1 mL PBSTx for 10 min.
Wash in 1 mL 1:1 PBSTx :Methanol for 10 min.
Store in 1 mL methanol at -20 °C until required.
Rehydrate in 1 mL 50:50 PBSTx :Methanol for 10 min.
x2 washes in 1 mL PBSTx for 10 min each.
Incubate in 1 mL fresh Proteinase K Solution for 15 min at Room temperature .
Postfix in 1 mL 4%FA for 10 min.
Wash in 1 mL PBSTx for 10 min.
Incubate in EdU Detection Solution for 30 min at Room temperature . NB: cover with tinfoil from this point on.
x2 washes in 1 mL PBSTx for 5 min each
Incubate in 1 mL DAPI Solution for 20 min at Room temperature or O/N at 4 °C .
Rinse in PBSTx and mount in VECTASHIELD Mounting Medium Vector Laboratories Catalog #H-1000 .
creator: Paul McCusker
